  === worker.ts ===                                                             
  import { Hono } from "hono";                                                  
  import { cors } from "hono/cors";                                             
  import { dbMiddleware } from "./middleware/db.js";                            
  import authRouter from "./routes/auth.js";                                    
  import schedulesRouter from "./routes/schedules.js";                          
  import executionsRouter from "./routes/executions.js";                        
  import wsRouter from "./routes/ws.js";                                        
  import type { Env } from "./types.js";                                        
                                                                                
  export { SchedulerDO } from "./durable-objects/scheduler-do.js";              
                                                                                
  const app = new Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>();                                    
                                                                                
  // Global middleware                                                          
  app.use("*", cors());                                                         
  app.use("*", dbMiddleware);                                                   
                                                                                
  // Health check                                                               
  app.get("/health", (c) =>                                                     
    c.json({ ok: true, data: { status: "healthy", version: "0.1.0" } })         
  );                                                                            
                                                                                
  // Routes                                                                     
  app.route("/v1/auth", authRouter);                                            
  app.route("/v1/schedules", schedulesRouter);                                  
  app.route("/v1", executionsRouter);                                           
  app.route("/v1/ws", wsRouter);                                                
                                                                                
  // 404                                                                        
  app.notFound((c) =>                                                           
    c.json(                                                                     
      { ok: false, error: { code: "not_found", message: "Not found" } },        
      404                                                                       
    )                                                                           
  );                                                                            
                                                                                
  // Error handler                                                              
  app.onError((err, c) => {                                                     
    console.error("Unhandled error:", err);                                     
    return c.json(                                                              
      {                                                                         
        ok: false,                                                              
        error: { code: "internal_error", message: "Internal server error" },    
      },                                                                        
      500                                                                       
    );                                                                          
  });                                                                           
                                                                                
  export default {                                                              
    fetch: app.fetch,                                                           
                                                                                
    // Cron trigger as a fallback to catch any missed alarms                    
    async scheduled(                                                            
      _event: ScheduledEvent,                                                   
      env: Env,                                                                 
      _ctx: ExecutionContext                                                    
    ): Promise<void> {

      // This cro                                                               
  … +1605 lines …

  Output the exact changes per file. End with PLAN_COMPLETE.                    
                                                                                
  ---                                                                           
  STEP OWNER CONTRACT:                                                          
  - You are the accountable owner for step "plan".                              
  - If you delegate, you must still verify completion yourself.                 
  - Preferred final decision format:                                            
    OWNER_DECISION: <one of COMPLETE, INCOMPLETE_RETRY, INCOMPLETE_FAIL,        
  NEEDS_CLARIFICATION>                                                          
    REASON: <one sentence>                                                      
  - Legacy completion marker still supported: STEP_COMPLETE:plan                
  - Then self-terminate immediately with /exit.                                 
                                                                                
  ---                                                                           
  AUTONOMOUS DELEGATION — READ THIS BEFORE STARTING:                            
  You have approximately 60 minutes before this step times out. Plan            
  accordingly — delegate early if the work is substantial.                      
                                                                                
  Before diving in, assess whether this task is too large or complex for a      
  single agent. If it involves multiple independent subtasks, touches many      
  files, or could take a long time, you should break it down and delegate to    
  helper agents to avoid timeouts.                                              
                                                                                
  Option 1 — Spawn relay agents (for real parallel coding work):                
    - mcp__relaycast__agent_add(name="helper-1", cli="claude", task="Specific   
  subtask description")                                                         
    - Coordinate via mcp__relaycast__message_dm_send(to="helper-1", text="...") 
    - Check on them with mcp__relaycast__message_inbox_check()                  
    - Clean up when done: mcp__relaycast__agent_remove(name="helper-1")         
                                                                                
  Option 2 — Use built-in sub-agents (Task tool) for research or scoped work:   
    - Good for exploring code, reading files, or making targeted changes        
    - Can run multiple sub-agents in parallel                                   
                                                                                
  Guidelines:                                                                   
  - You are the lead — delegate but stay in control, track progress, integrate  
  results                                                                       
  - Give each helper a clear, self-contained task with enough context to work   
  independently                                                                 
  - For simple or quick work, just do it yourself — don't over-delegate         
  - Always release spawned relay agents when their work is complete             
  - When spawning non-claude agents (codex, gemini, etc.), prepend to their     
  task:                                                                         
    "RELAY SETUP: First call register(name='<exact-agent-name>') before any     
  other relay tool."                                                            
                                                                                
                                                                                
  ---                                                                           
  IMPORTANT: When you have fully completed this task, you MUST self-terminate   
  by either: (a) calling remove_agent(name: "<your-agent-name>", reason: "task  
  completed") — preferred, or (b) outputting the exact text "/exit" on its own  
  line as a fallback. Do not wait for further input — terminate immediately     
  after finishing. Do NOT spawn sub-agents unless the task explicitly requires  
  it.

  ✳





                                     (to: "broker", text: "PLAN: Rewrite                                   packages/server to remove ALL Cloudflare                                   dependencies\n\n## Inventory of CF                                   Dependencies\n\n| Location | CF API/Type |                                   Replacement |\n|---|---|---|\n| `types.ts` |                                    `D1Database`, `DurableObjectNamespace`,                                   `DrizzleD1Database` | `better-sqlite3`,                                         `BetterSqlite3Database` |\n|
                                   `middleware/db.ts` | `drizzle(\"d1\")`,
                                   `c.env.DB` | Closure-injected db instance
                                   |\n| `middleware/auth.ts` |
                                   `crypto.subtle.digest`,
                                   `c.executionCtx.waitUntil` | `node:crypto
                                   createHash`, fire-and-forget promise |\n|
                                   `routes/schedules.ts` |
                                   `c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromName/get`, DO stub
                                   fetch | `Scheduler` interface via Hono
                                   context |\n| `routes/ws.ts` |
                                   `WebSocketPair`, CF WebSocket API |
                                   `@hono/node-ws` upgrade helper |\n|
                                   `routes/auth.ts` | `Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>`
                                   | `Hono<AppEnv>` (no CF bindings) |\n|
                                   `routes/executions.ts` | `Hono<{ Bindings:
                                   Env }>` | `Hono<AppEnv>` (no CF bindings)
                                   |\n| `worker.ts` | CF Worker export,
                                   `ScheduledEvent`, `ExecutionContext`, DO
                                   re-export | Replaced by `app.ts` +
                                   `server.ts` |\n| `tsconfig.json` |
                                   `@cloudflare/workers-types` | Remove |\n|
                                   `package.json` | `wrangler`,
                                   `@cloudflare/workers-types`, `drizzle-orm/d1`
                                    | `@hono/node-server`, `@hono/node-ws`,
                                   `better-sqlite3`, `tsx` |\n|
                                   `engine/executor.ts` | None (already
                                   portable) | Keep as-is |\n| `engine/cron.ts`
                                   | None (already portable) | Keep as-is |\n|
                                   `db/schema.ts` | None
                                   (`drizzle-orm/sqlite-core`) | Keep as-is
                                   |\n\n---\n\n## File-by-File Changes\n\n### 1.
                                    `packages/server/package.json` — Rewrite
                                   deps\n\n**Remove:**\n-
                                   `@cloudflare/workers-types` (devDeps)\n-
                                   `wrangler` (devDeps)\n- All
                                   `deploy`/`deploy:staging`/`deploy:production`
                                    scripts\n\n**Add dependencies:**\n-
                                   `@hono/node-server` `^1.19.0`\n-
                                   `@hono/node-ws` `^1.1.0`\n- `better-sqlite3`
                                   `^11.10.0`\n\n**Add devDependencies:**\n-
                                   `@types/better-sqlite3` `^7.6.12`\n- `tsx`
                                   `^4.19.0`\n\n**Update
                                   scripts:**\n```json\n{\n  \"dev\": \"tsx
                                   watch src/server.ts\",\n  \"start\": \"tsx
                                   src/server.ts\",\n  \"build\":
                                   \"tsc\"\n}\n```\n\n**Add exports** (so cloud
                                   package can import
                                   `createApp`):\n```json\n{\n  \"main\":
                                   \"dist/index.js\",\n  \"types\":
                                   \"dist/index.d.ts\",\n  \"exports\": {\n
                                   \".\": { \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",
                                   \"import\": \"./dist/index.js\" }\n
                                   }\n}\n```\n\nKeep `\"private\": true` since
                                   the server isn't published to
                                   npm.\n\n---\n\n### 2. `src/types.ts` — Remove
                                    all CF types\n\n**Full
                                   rewrite:**\n```ts\nimport type {
                                   BetterSQLite3Database } from
                                   \"drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3\";\nimport type
                                   * as schema from
                                   \"./db/schema.js\";\n\nexport type Database =
                                    BetterSQLite3Database<typeof
                                   schema>;\n\nexport interface Scheduler {\n
                                   setAlarm(scheduleId: string, runAt: string):
                                   void;\n  cancelAlarm(scheduleId: string):
                                   void;\n}\n\nexport interface AuthContext {\n
                                    apiKeyId: string;\n}\n\nexport interface
                                   AppEnv {\n  Variables: {\n    db:1CDatabase;\n
                                       auth: AuthContext;\n    scheduler:
                                   Scheduler;\n  };\n}\n```\n\n**Key
                                   changes:**\n- `Env` (CF bindings) → `AppEnv`
                                   (Hono Variables)\n- `Database` from
                                   `drizzle-orm/d1` →
                                   `drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3`\n- New
                                   `Scheduler` interface — abstract enough for
                                   cloud to implement with DOs\n- Remove
                                   `declare module \"hono\"` global
                                   augmentation; use typed `Hono<AppEnv>`
                                   instead\n\n---\n\n### 3. `src/db/schema.ts` —
                                    NO CHANGES\n\nAlready uses
                                   `drizzle-orm/sqlite-core` which is
                                   runtime-agnostic.\n\n---\n\n### 4.
                                   `src/db/sqlite.ts` — NEW
                                   FILE\n\n```ts\nimport Database from
                                   \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport { drizzle } from
                                   \"drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3\";\nimport * as
                                   schema from \"./schema.js\";\n\nexport
                                   function createDatabase(dbPath: string) {\n
                                   const sqlite = new Database(dbPath);\n
                                   sqlite.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n
                                   sqlite.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n
                                   return drizzle(sqlite, { schema
                                   });\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5.
                                   `src/middleware/db.ts` — Closure-based,
                                   remove CF\n\n**Full rewrite:**\n```ts\nimport
                                    { createMiddleware } from
                                   \"hono/factory\";\nimport type { AppEnv,
                                   Database } from \"../types.js\";\n\nexport
                                   function createDbMiddleware(db: Database) {\n
                                     return createMiddleware<AppEnv>(async (c,
                                   next) => {\n    c.set(\"db\", db);\n    await
                                    next();\n  });\n}\n```\n\n**Changes:** No
                                   more `drizzle(c.env.DB)` per-request. DB
                                   created once in server.ts, injected via
                                   closure.\n\n---\n\n### 6.
                                   `src/middleware/auth.ts` — Node.js crypto,
                                   remove waitUntil\n\n**Changes:**\n1. Replace
                                   `crypto.subtle.digest` with
                                   `node:crypto`:\n```ts\nimport { createHash }
                                   from \"node:crypto\";\n\nfunction
                                   hashKey(key: string): string {\n  return
                                   createHash(\"sha256\").update(key).digest(\"h
                                   ex\");\n}\n```\nNote: function becomes
                                   **synchronous** (no more `async`/`await`).
                                   All call sites using `await hashKey()` still
                                   work since awaiting a non-Promise is a
                                   no-op.\n\n2. Replace
                                   `c.executionCtx.waitUntil(...)` with
                                   fire-and-forget:\n```ts\n// Update
                                   last_used_at (fire and
                                   forget)\ndb.update(apiKeys)\n  .set({
                                   last_used_at: new Date().toISOString() })\n
                                   .where(eq(apiKeys.id, key.id));\n```\nNote:
                                   with better-sqlite3 this is synchronous
                                   anyway, so no waitUntil needed. Just call it
                                   directly.\n\n3. Change middleware generic
                                   from `<{ Bindings: Env }>` to
                                   `<AppEnv>`.\n\n---\n\n### 7.
                                   `src/routes/auth.ts` — Minimal
                                   changes\n\n**Changes:**\n- `import type { Env
                                    } from \"../types.js\"` → `import type {
                                   AppEnv } from \"../types.js\"`\n- `new Hono<{
                                    Bindings: Env }>()` → `new
                                   Hono<AppEnv>()`\n- `hashKey` is now sync —
                                   `await hashKey(rawKey)` still works (no-op
                                   await)\n\n---\n\n### 8.
                                   `src/routes/schedules.ts` — Replace DO calls
                                   with Scheduler interface\n\n**Changes:**\n1.
                                   `import type { Env }` → `import type { AppEnv
                                    }`\n2. `new Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>()` →
                                   `new Hono<AppEnv>()`\n3. **Create handler**
                                   (lines 134-142): Replace DO stub
                                   calls:\n```ts\n// Old:\nconst doId =
                                   c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromName(id);\nconst
                                   stub = c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.get(doId);\nawait
                                   stub.fetch(\"http://internal/set-alarm\", {
                                   ... });\n\n// New:\nconst scheduler =
                                   c.get(\"scheduler\");\nscheduler.setAlarm(id,
                                    nextRunAt);\n```\n\n4. **Update handler**
                                   (lines 332-348): Replace DO alarm
                                   update:\n```ts\n// Old:\nconst doId =
                                   c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromName(c.req.param(\"i
                                   d\"));\nconst stub =
                                   c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.get(doId);\nif
                                   (updates.next_run_at) {\n  await
                                   stub.fetch(\"http://internal/set-alarm\", {
                                   ... });\n} else {\n  await
                                   stub.fetch(\"http://internal/cancel-alarm\",
                                   { ... });\n}\n\n// New:\nconst scheduler =
                                   c.get(\"scheduler\");\nif
                                   (updates.next_run_at) {\n
                                   scheduler.setAlarm(c.req.param(\"id\"),
                                   updates.next_run_at as string);\n} else {\n
                                   scheduler.cancelAlarm(c.req.param(\"id\"));\n
                                   }\n```\n\n5. **Delete handler** (lines
                                   386-389): Replace DO cancel:\n```ts\n//
                                   Old:\nconst doId = c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromN
                                   ame(c.req.param(\"id\"));\nconst stub =
                                   c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.get(doId);\nawait
                                   stub.fetch(\"http://internal/cancel-alarm\",
                                   { ... });\n\n// New:\nconst scheduler =
                                   c.get(\"scheduler\");\nscheduler.cancelAlarm(
                                   c.req.param(\"id\"));\n```\n\n---\n\n### 9.
                                   `src/routes/executions.ts` — Minimal
                                   changes\n\n**Changes:**\n- `import type { Env
                                    }` → `import type { AppEnv }`\n- `new Hono<{
                                    Bindings: Env }>()` → `new
                                   Hono<AppEnv>()`\n\nNo CF APIs used in this
                                   file.\n\n---\n\n### 10. `src/routes/ws.ts` —
                                   Replace CF WebSocketPair with
                                   @hono/node-ws\n\n**Full rewrite** using
                                   `@hono/node-ws` `createNodeWebSocket`:\n\nThe
                                    WebSocket route needs a different approach
                                   on Node.js. The `ws` route will use
                                   `@hono/node-ws` which provides
                                   `upgradeWebSocket` for Hono:\n\n```ts\nimport
                                    { createFactory } from
                                   \"hono/factory\";\nimport { eq } from
                                   \"drizzle-orm\";\nimport { apiKeys } from
                                   \"../db/schema.js\";\nimport { hashKey } from
                                    \"../middleware/auth.js\";\nimport type {
                                   AppEnv } from \"../types.js\";\nimport type {
                                    WsMessage } from
                                   \"@relaycron/types\";\nimport type {
                                   UpgradeWebSocket } from
                                   \"hono/ws\";\n\nexport function
                                   createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket:
                                   UpgradeWebSocket) {\n  const factory =
                                   createFactory<AppEnv>();\n  const wsRouter =
                                   factory.createApp();\n\n  wsRouter.get(\n
                                   \"/\",\n    upgradeWebSocket((c) => {\n
                                   let authenticated = false;\n      let
                                   authTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> |
                                   undefined;\n      const db =
                                   c.get(\"db\");\n\n      return {\n
                                   onOpen(_evt, ws) {\n          authTimer =
                                   setTimeout(() => {\n            if
                                   (!authenticated) {\n
                                   ws.send(JSON.stringify({\n
                                   type: \"error\", code: \"auth_timeout\",
                                   message: \"Authentication timeout\",\n
                                          }));\n              ws.close(4001,
                                   \"Authentication timeout\");\n            }\n
                                             }, 10000);\n        },\n
                                   async onMessage(evt, ws) {\n          try {\n
                                               const msg = JSON.parse(typeof
                                   evt.data === \"string\" ? evt.data : \"\") as
                                    WsMessage;\n            if (!authenticated)
                                   {\n              if (msg.type === \"auth\" &&
                                    \"api_key\" in msg) {\n                const
                                    keyHash = hashKey(msg.api_key);\n
                                        const [key] = await db\n
                                     .select().from(apiKeys)\n
                                   .where(eq(apiKeys.key_hash,
                                   keyHash)).limit(1);\n                if
                                   (!key) {\n
                                   ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: \"error\",
                                   code: \"unauthorized\", message: \"Invalid
                                   API key\" }));\n
                                   ws.close(4003, \"Unauthorized\");\n
                                           return;\n                }\n
                                          authenticated = true;\n
                                    if (authTimer) clearTimeout(authTimer);\n
                                                ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type:
                                   \"auth_ok\", agent_id: key.id }));\n
                                        }\n              return;\n
                                   }\n            if (msg.type === \"ping\") {\n
                                                 ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type:
                                   \"pong\" }));\n            }\n          }
                                   catch {\n            ws.send(JSON.stringify({
                                    type: \"error\", code: \"parse_error\",
                                   message: \"Invalid message format\" }));\n
                                          }\n        },\n        onClose() {\n
                                           if (authTimer)
                                   clearTimeout(authTimer);\n        },\n
                                   };\n    })\n  );\n\n  return
                                   wsRouter;\n}\n```\n\n**Key change:** The
                                   route is now a factory function
                                   `createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket)` because
                                   `@hono/node-ws` provides the
                                   `upgradeWebSocket` helper at server creation
                                   time. `app.ts` calls `createWsRoute()` and
                                   mounts it.\n\n---\n\n### 11.
                                   `src/engine/cron.ts` — NO CHANGES\n\nAlready
                                   portable (uses `cron-parser`).\n\n---\n\n###
                                   12. `src/engine/executor.ts` — NO
                                   CHANGES\n\nAlready portable. Uses standard
                                   `fetch`, `setTimeout`, `AbortController`. The
                                    `Database` type import from `../types.js`
                                   will resolve to the new better-sqlite3 type
                                   automatically.\n\n---\n\n### 13.
                                   `src/engine/scheduler.ts` — NEW FILE
                                   (LocalScheduler)\n\n```ts\nimport { eq } from
                                    \"drizzle-orm\";\nimport * as schema from
                                   \"../db/schema.js\";\nimport {\n
                                   executeWebhookWithRetry,\n
                                   recordExecution,\n  advanceSchedule,\n} from
                                   \"./executor.js\";\nimport type { Database,
                                   Scheduler } from \"../types.js\";\n\nconst
                                   WEBHOOK_RETRY_CONFIG = {\n  maxAttempts: 3,\n
                                     initialBackoffMs: 1000,\n
                                   backoffMultiplier: 5,\n} as const;\n\nexport
                                   class LocalScheduler implements Scheduler {\n
                                     private timers = new Map<string,
                                   ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>();\n  private
                                   db: Database;\n\n  constructor(db: Database)
                                   {\n    this.db = db;\n  }\n\n
                                   setAlarm(scheduleId: string, runAt: string):
                                   void {\n    this.cancelAlarm(scheduleId);\n
                                     const delayMs = Math.max(0, new
                                   Date(runAt).getTime() - Date.now());\n
                                   const timer = setTimeout(() => {\n
                                   this.timers.delete(scheduleId);\n
                                   this.fire(scheduleId).catch((err) =>\n
                                    console.error(`Scheduler fire error
                                   [${scheduleId}]:`, err)\n      );\n    },
                                   delayMs);\n    // Unref so the timer doesn't
                                   keep the process alive if server is shutting
                                   down\n    timer.unref();\n
                                   this.timers.set(scheduleId, timer);\n  }\n\n
                                    cancelAlarm(scheduleId: string): void {\n
                                    const existing =
                                   this.timers.get(scheduleId);\n    if
                                   (existing) {\n      clearTimeout(existing);\n
                                         this.timers.delete(scheduleId);\n
                                   }\n  }\n\n  /** Restore timers for all active
                                    schedules with a next_run_at. Call on
                                   startup. */\n  restoreAlarms(): void {\n
                                   const rows = this.db\n      .select()\n
                                   .from(schema.schedules)\n
                                   .where(eq(schema.schedules.status,
                                   \"active\"))\n      .all();\n\n    for (const
                                    row of rows) {\n      if (row.next_run_at)
                                   {\n        this.setAlarm(row.id,
                                   row.next_run_at);\n      }\n    }\n
                                   console.log(`Restored ${this.timers.size}
                                   schedule alarm(s)`);\n  }\n\n  shutdown():
                                   void {\n    for (const timer of
                                   this.timers.values()) {\n
                                   clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n
                                   this.timers.clear();\n  }\n\n  private async
                                   fire(scheduleId: string): Promise<void> {\n
                                     const [schedule] = await this.db\n
                                   .select()\n      .from(schema.schedules)\n
                                      .where(eq(schema.schedules.id,
                                   scheduleId))\n      .limit(1);\n\n    if
                                   (!schedule || schedule.status !== \"active\")
                                    return;\n\n    const transportConfig =
                                   JSON.parse(schedule.transport_config);\n\n
                                    if (schedule.transport_type === \"webhook\")
                                    {\n      const result = await
                                   executeWebhookWithRetry(\n
                                   transportConfig.url,\n
                                   JSON.parse(schedule.payload),\n
                                   transportConfig.headers ?? {},\n
                                   transportConfig.timeout_ms ?? 10000,\n
                                    WEBHOOK_RETRY_CONFIG\n      );\n      await
                                   recordExecution(this.db, scheduleId,
                                   \"webhook\", result);\n    } else if
                                   (schedule.transport_type === \"websocket\")
                                   {\n      await recordExecution(this.db,
                                   scheduleId, \"websocket\", {\n        status:
                                    \"failure\",\n        error: \"WebSocket
                                   transport delivery is not yet available
                                   end-to-end; use webhook transport.\",\n
                                     duration_ms: 0,\n        attempt_count:
                                   1,\n      });\n    }\n\n    const nextRunAt =
                                    await advanceSchedule(\n      this.db,\n
                                     scheduleId,\n
                                   schedule.schedule_type,\n
                                   schedule.cron_expression,\n
                                   schedule.timezone\n    );\n\n    if
                                   (nextRunAt) {\n
                                   this.setAlarm(scheduleId, nextRunAt);\n
                                   }\n  }\n}\n```\n\nThis is a direct port of
                                   `SchedulerDO.alarm()` logic, using
                                   `setTimeout` instead of DO alarms. The
                                   `restoreAlarms()` method replaces the CF cron
                                    sweep — called on startup to rearm any
                                   active schedules.\n\n---\n\n### 14.
                                   `src/app.ts` — NEW FILE (createApp
                                   factory)\n\nThis is the **critical export**
                                   that cloud will import.\n\n```ts\nimport {
                                   Hono } from \"hono\";\nimport { cors } from
                                   \"hono/cors\";\nimport { createDbMiddleware }
                                    from \"./middleware/db.js\";\nimport
                                   authRouter from \"./routes/auth.js\";\nimport
                                    schedulesRouter from
                                   \"./routes/schedules.js\";\nimport
                                   executionsRouter from
                                   \"./routes/executions.js\";\nimport {
                                   createWsRoute } from
                                   \"./routes/ws.js\";\nimport type { AppEnv,
                                   Database, Scheduler } from
                                   \"./types.js\";\nimport type {
                                   UpgradeWebSocket } from
                                   \"hono/ws\";\n\nexport interface
                                   CreateAppOptions {\n  db: Database;\n
                                   scheduler: Scheduler;\n  upgradeWebSocket?:
                                   UpgradeWebSocket;\n}\n\nexport function
                                   createApp(options: CreateAppOptions):
                                   Hono<AppEnv> {\n  const { db, scheduler,
                                   upgradeWebSocket } = options;\n\n  const app
                                   = new Hono<AppEnv>();\n\n  // Global
                                   middleware\n  app.use(\"*\", cors());\n
                                   app.use(\"*\", createDbMiddleware(db));\n
                                   app.use(\"*\", async (c, next) => {\n
                                   c.set(\"scheduler\", scheduler);\n    await
                                   next();\n  });\n\n  // Health check\n
                                   app.get(\"/health\", (c) =>\n    c.json({ ok:
                                    true, data: { status: \"healthy\", version:
                                   \"0.1.0\" } })\n  );\n\n  // Routes\n
                                   app.route(\"/v1/auth\", authRouter);\n
                                   app.route(\"/v1/schedules\",
                                   schedulesRouter);\n  app.route(\"/v1\",
                                   executionsRouter);\n\n  if (upgradeWebSocket)
                                    {\n    app.route(\"/v1/ws\",
                                   createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket));\n  }\n\n
                                   // 404\n  app.notFound((c) =>\n    c.json({
                                   ok: false, error: { code: \"not_found\",
                                   message: \"Not found\" } }, 404)\n  );\n\n
                                   // Error handler\n  app.onError((err, c) =>
                                   {\n    console.error(\"Unhandled error:\",
                                   err);\n    return c.json(\n      { ok: false,
                                    error: { code: \"internal_error\", message:
                                   \"Internal server error\" } },\n      500\n
                                     );\n  });\n\n  return
                                   app;\n}\n```\n\n**Signature:** `createApp({
                                   db, scheduler, upgradeWebSocket? })` →
                                   `Hono<AppEnv>`\n\nThe `upgradeWebSocket`
                                   param is optional — cloud can omit it if WS
                                   isn't needed in that
                                   environment.\n\n---\n\n### 15.
                                   `src/server.ts` — NEW FILE (standalone entry
                                   point)\n\n```ts\nimport process from
                                   \"node:process\";\nimport { serve } from
                                   \"@hono/node-server\";\nimport {
                                   createNodeWebSocket } from
                                   \"@hono/node-ws\";\nimport { createDatabase }
                                    from \"./db/sqlite.js\";\nimport {
                                   LocalScheduler } from
                                   \"./engine/scheduler.js\";\nimport {
                                   createApp } from \"./app.js\";\n\nconst
                                   DB_PATH = process.env.DB_PATH ??
                                   \"data/relaycron.db\";\nconst PORT =
                                   Number(process.env.PORT) || 3000;\n\nconst db
                                    = createDatabase(DB_PATH);\nconst scheduler
                                   = new LocalScheduler(db);\n\nconst {
                                   injectWebSocket, upgradeWebSocket } =
                                   createNodeWebSocket({ app: undefined as any
                                   });\n\nconst app = createApp({ db, scheduler,
                                    upgradeWebSocket });\n\nconst server =
                                   serve({ fetch: app.fetch, port: PORT },
                                   (info) => {\n  console.log(`relaycron server
                                   listening on
                                   http://localhost:${info.port}`);\n
                                   scheduler.restoreAlarms();\n});\n\ninjectWebS
                                   ocket(server);\n\n// Graceful
                                   shutdown\nprocess.on(\"SIGINT\", () => {\n
                                   scheduler.shutdown();\n  process.exit(0);\n})
                                   ;\nprocess.on(\"SIGTERM\", () => {\n
                                   scheduler.shutdown();\n
                                   process.exit(0);\n});\n```\n\nNote:
                                   `createNodeWebSocket` needs the server
                                   instance for WS injection. The `app:
                                   undefined as any` is the documented pattern
                                   from `@hono/node-ws` when using the
                                   `injectWebSocket` approach — the app is
                                   created after the upgradeWebSocket
                                   helper.\n\n---\n\n### 16. `src/index.ts` —
                                   NEW FILE (package entry point for cloud
                                   imports)\n\n```ts\nexport { createApp } from
                                   \"./app.js\";\nexport type { CreateAppOptions
                                    } from \"./app.js\";\nexport type {
                                   Database, Scheduler, AppEnv, AuthContext }
                                   from \"./types.js\";\n```\n\nThis is what
                                   `../cloud` will `import { createApp,
                                   Scheduler } from
                                   \"@relaycron/server\"`.\n\n---\n\n### 17.
                                   DELETE `src/worker.ts`\n\nAlready deleted
                                   from git (shown in status as `D`), but if the
                                    file still exists on disk, delete it. It is
                                   replaced by `app.ts` +
                                   `server.ts`.\n\n---\n\n### 18.
                                   `tsconfig.json` — Remove CF
                                   types\n\n```json\n{\n  \"extends\":
                                   \"../../tsconfig.base.json\",\n
                                   \"compilerOptions\": {\n    \"outDir\":
                                   \"dist\",\n    \"rootDir\": \"src\"\n  },\n
                                   \"include\": [\"src\"],\n  \"references\": [{
                                    \"path\": \"../types\"
                                   }]\n}\n```\n\n**Change:** Remove `\"types\":
                                   [\"@cloudflare/workers-types\"]`.\n\n---\n\n#
                                   ## 19. Root `package.json` — Update db
                                   scripts\n\n**Remove:**\n- `\"db:migrate\":
                                   \"wrangler d1 migrations apply agentcron-db
                                   --local\"`\n\n**Update:**\n-
                                   `\"db:generate\": \"drizzle-kit generate\"` —
                                    keep as-is (drizzle-kit is
                                   runtime-agnostic)\n\nOptionally add a migrate
                                    script that uses drizzle-kit's `migrate`
                                   with better-sqlite3, but this can be
                                   deferred.\n\n---\n\n## Migration Table
                                   (drizzle schema push)\n\nSince the D1
                                   migration file `0000_init.sql` was deleted,
                                   the local server needs a way to initialize
                                   the DB. Two options:\n\n**Option A
                                   (recommended):** Use `drizzle-kit push` in
                                   `createDatabase()` or have a `db:push`
                                   script. Drizzle-kit can push schema directly
                                   to better-sqlite3.\n\n**Option B:** Generate
                                   a fresh migration with `drizzle-kit generate`
                                    targeting `better-sqlite3` dialect.\n\nFor
                                   the MVP, **Option A** is simpler — add
                                   `db:push` to root scripts. The schema in
                                   `db/schema.ts` is the source of
                                   truth.\n\n---\n\n## Summary of
                                   New/Changed/Deleted Files\n\n| File | Action
                                   | CF dep removed |\n|---|---|---|\n|
                                   `package.json` | **EDIT** | wrangler,
                                   @cloudflare/workers-types |\n|
                                   `tsconfig.json` | **EDIT** |
                                   @cloudflare/workers-types |\n| `src/types.ts`
                                    | **REWRITE** | D1Database,
                                   DurableObjectNamespace, DrizzleD1Database
                                   |\n| `src/db/schema.ts` | KEEP | — |\n|
                                   `src/db/sqlite.ts` | **NEW** | — |\n|
                                   `src/middleware/db.ts` | **REWRITE** |
                                   drizzle-orm/d1, c.env.DB |\n|
                                   `src/middleware/auth.ts` | **EDIT** |
                                   crypto.subtle, executionCtx.waitUntil |\n|
                                   `src/routes/auth.ts` | **EDIT** | Env
                                   bindings type |\n| `src/routes/schedules.ts`
                                   | **EDIT** | SCHEDULER_DO (3 call sites) |\n|
                                    `src/routes/executions.ts` | **EDIT** | Env
                                   bindings type |\n| `src/routes/ws.ts` |
                                   **REWRITE** | WebSocketPair |\n|
                                   `src/engine/cron.ts` | KEEP | — |\n|
                                   `src/engine/executor.ts` | KEEP | — |\n|
                                   `src/engine/scheduler.ts` | **NEW** | — |\n|
                                   `src/app.ts` | **NEW** | — |\n|
                                   `src/server.ts` | **NEW** | — |\n|
                                   `src/index.ts` | **NEW** | — |\n|
                                   `src/worker.ts` | **DELETE** | entire file is

  import { Hono } from "hono";                                                  
  import { cors } from "hono/cors";
