⏺ relaycast - message.reply (MCP)(message_id:
                                 "init_5cc1732d4ef04085b3a657aaab07d3d4", text:
                                 "PLAN: Rewrite packages/server to remove ALL
                                 Cloudflare dependencies\n\n## Inventory of CF
                                 Dependencies\n\n| Location | CF API/Type |
                                 Replacement |\n|---|---|---|\n| `types.ts` |
                                 `D1Database`, `DurableObjectNamespace`,
                                 `DrizzleD1Database` | `better-sqlite3`,
                                 `BetterSqlite3Database` |\n| `middleware/db.ts`
                                  | `drizzle(\"d1\")`, `c.env.DB` |
                                 Closure-injected db instance |\n|
                                 `middleware/auth.ts` | `crypto.subtle.digest`,
                                 `c.executionCtx.waitUntil` | `node:crypto
                                 createHash`, fire-and-forget |\n|
                                 `routes/schedules.ts` |
                                 `c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromName/get`, DO stub
                                 fetch | `Scheduler` interface via Hono context
                                 |\n| `routes/ws.ts` | `WebSocketPair`, CF
                                 WebSocket API | `@hono/node-ws` upgrade helper
                                 |\n| `routes/auth.ts` | `Hono<{ Bindings: Env
                                 }>` | `Hono<AppEnv>` (no CF bindings) |\n|
                                 `routes/executions.ts` | `Hono<{ Bindings: Env
                                 }>` | `Hono<AppEnv>` (no CF bindings) |\n|
                                 `worker.ts` | CF Worker export,
                                 `ScheduledEvent`, `ExecutionContext`, DO
                                 re-export | Replaced by `app.ts` + `server.ts`
                                 |\n| `tsconfig.json` |
                                 `@cloudflare/workers-types` | Remove |\n|
                                 `package.json` | `wrangler`,
                                 `@cloudflare/workers-types`, `drizzle-orm/d1` |
                                  `@hono/node-server`, `@hono/node-ws`,
                                 `better-sqlite3`, `tsx`
                                 |\n\n`engine/executor.ts`, `engine/cron.ts`,
                                 `db/schema.ts` — **already portable, no changes
                                  needed**.\n\n---\n\n## File-by-File
                                 Changes\n\n### 1.
                                 `packages/server/package.json` — Rewrite
                                 deps\n\n**Remove:**\n-
                                 `@cloudflare/workers-types` (devDeps)\n-
                                 `wrangler` (devDeps)\n- All
                                 `deploy`/`deploy:staging`/`deploy:production`
                                 scripts\n\n**Add dependencies:**\n-
                                 `@hono/node-server` `^1.19.0`\n-
                                 `@hono/node-ws` `^1.1.0`\n- `better-sqlite3`
                                 `^11.10.0`\n\n**Add devDependencies:**\n-
                                 `@types/better-sqlite3` `^7.6.12`\n- `tsx`
                                 `^4.19.0`\n\n**Update scripts:**\n```json\n{\n
                                  \"dev\": \"tsx watch src/server.ts\",\n
                                 \"start\": \"tsx src/server.ts\",\n  \"build\":
                                  \"tsc\"\n}\n```\n\n**Add exports** (so cloud
                                 package can import `createApp`):\n```json\n{\n
                                  \"main\": \"dist/index.js\",\n  \"types\":
                                 \"dist/index.d.ts\",\n  \"exports\": {\n
                                 \".\": { \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",
                                 \"import\": \"./dist/index.js\" }\n
                                 }\n}\n```\n\nKeep `\"private\": true` since the
                                  server isn't published to npm.\n\n---\n\n###
                                 2. `src/types.ts` — Remove all CF
                                 types\n\n**Full rewrite:**\n```ts\nimport type
                                 { BetterSQLite3Database } from
                                 \"drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3\";\nimport type *
                                 as schema from \"./db/schema.js\";\n\nexport
                                 type Database = BetterSQLite3Database<typeof
                                 schema>;\n\nexport interface Scheduler {\n
                                 setAlarm(scheduleId: string, runAt: string):
                                 void;\n  cancelAlarm(scheduleId: string):
                                 void;\n}\n\nexport interface AuthContext {\n
                                 apiKeyId: string;\n}\n\nexport interface AppEnv
                                  {\n  Variables: {\n    db: Database;\n
                                 auth: AuthContext;\n    scheduler: Scheduler;\n
                                   };\n}\n```\n\n**Key changes:**\n- `Env` (CF
                                 bindings) → `AppEnv` (Hono Variables)\n-
                                 `Database` from `drizzle-orm/d1` →
                                 `drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3`\n- New `Scheduler`
                                  interface — abstract enough for cloud to
                                 implement with DOs\n- Remove `declare module
                                 \"hono\"` global augmentation; use typed
                                 `Hono<AppEnv>` instead\n\n---\n\n### 3.
                                 `src/db/schema.ts` — NO CHANGES\n\nAlready uses
                                  `drizzle-orm/sqlite-core` which is
                                 runtime-agnostic.\n\n---\n\n### 4.
                                 `src/db/sqlite.ts` — NEW FILE\n\n```ts\nimport
                                 Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport {
                                 drizzle } from
                                 \"drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3\";\nimport * as
                                 schema from \"./schema.js\";\n\nexport function
                                  createDatabase(dbPath: string) {\n  const
                                 sqlite = new Database(dbPath);\n
                                 sqlite.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n
                                 sqlite.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  return
                                  drizzle(sqlite, { schema
                                 });\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5.
                                 `src/middleware/db.ts` — Closure-based, remove
                                 CF\n\n**Full rewrite:**\n```ts\nimport {
                                 createMiddleware } from
                                 \"hono/factory\";\nimport type { AppEnv,
                                 Database } from \"../types.js\";\n\nexport
                                 function createDbMiddleware(db: Database) {\n
                                 return createMiddleware<AppEnv>(async (c, next)
                                  => {\n    c.set(\"db\", db);\n    await
                                 next();\n  });\n}\n```\n\nNo more
                                 `drizzle(c.env.DB)` per-request. DB created
                                 once in server.ts, injected via
                                 closure.\n\n---\n\n### 6.
                                 `src/middleware/auth.ts` — Node.js crypto,
                                 remove waitUntil\n\n**Changes:**\n1. Replace
                                 `crypto.subtle.digest` with
                                 `node:crypto`:\n```ts\nimport { createHash }
                                 from \"node:crypto\";\n\nfunction hashKey(key:
                                 string): string {\n  return
                                 createHash(\"sha256\").update(key).digest(\"hex
                                 \");\n}\n```\nFunction becomes **synchronous**.
                                  All call sites using `await hashKey()` still
                                 work (no-op await).\n\n2. Replace
                                 `c.executionCtx.waitUntil(...)` with direct
                                 call:\n```ts\n// Update last_used_at (fire and
                                 forget — synchronous with
                                 better-sqlite3)\ndb.update(apiKeys)\n  .set({
                                 last_used_at: new Date().toISOString() })\n
                                 .where(eq(apiKeys.id, key.id));\n```\n\n3.
                                 Change middleware generic from `<{ Bindings:
                                 Env }>` to `<AppEnv>`.\n\n---\n\n### 7.
                                 `src/routes/auth.ts` — Minimal changes\n\n-
                                 `import type { Env }` → `import type { AppEnv
                                 }`\n- `new Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>()` → `new
                                 Hono<AppEnv>()`\n\n---\n\n### 8.
                                 `src/routes/schedules.ts` — Replace DO calls
                                 with Scheduler interface\n\n1. `import type {
                                 Env }` → `import type { AppEnv }`\n2. `new
                                 Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>()` → `new
                                 Hono<AppEnv>()`\n3. **Create handler** (lines
                                 134-142): Replace DO stub calls:\n```ts\n//
                                 Old:\nconst doId =
                                 c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromName(id);\nconst stub
                                 = c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.get(doId);\nawait
                                 stub.fetch(\"http://internal/set-alarm\", { ...
                                  });\n\n// New:\nconst scheduler =
                                 c.get(\"scheduler\");\nscheduler.setAlarm(id,
                                 nextRunAt);\n```\n\n4. **Update handler**
                                 (lines 332-348): Replace DO alarm
                                 update:\n```ts\nconst scheduler =
                                 c.get(\"scheduler\");\nif (updates.next_run_at)
                                  {\n  scheduler.setAlarm(c.req.param(\"id\"),
                                 updates.next_run_at as string);\n} else {\n
                                 scheduler.cancelAlarm(c.req.param(\"id\"));\n}\
                                 n```\n\n5. **Delete handler** (lines 386-389):
                                 Replace DO cancel:\n```ts\nconst scheduler =
                                 c.get(\"scheduler\");\nscheduler.cancelAlarm(c.
                                 req.param(\"id\"));\n```\n\n---\n\n### 9.
                                 `src/routes/executions.ts` — Minimal
                                 changes\n\n- `import type { Env }` → `import
                                 type { AppEnv }`\n- `new Hono<{ Bindings: Env
                                 }>()` → `new Hono<AppEnv>()`\n\n---\n\n### 10.
                                 `src/routes/ws.ts` — Replace CF WebSocketPair
                                 with @hono/node-ws\n\n**Full rewrite** — export
                                  a factory `createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket)`:\n
                                 \n```ts\nimport { createFactory } from
                                 \"hono/factory\";\nimport { eq } from
                                 \"drizzle-orm\";\nimport { apiKeys } from
                                 \"../db/schema.js\";\nimport { hashKey } from
                                 \"../middleware/auth.js\";\nimport type {
                                 AppEnv } from \"../types.js\";\nimport type {
                                 WsMessage } from \"@relaycron/types\";\nimport
                                 type { UpgradeWebSocket } from
                                 \"hono/ws\";\n\nexport function
                                 createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket:
                                 UpgradeWebSocket) {\n  const factory =
                                 createFactory<AppEnv>();\n  const wsRouter =
                                 factory.createApp();\n\n  wsRouter.get(\"/\",
                                 upgradeWebSocket((c) => {\n    let
                                 authenticated = false;\n    let authTimer:
                                 ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined;\n
                                  const db = c.get(\"db\");\n    return {\n
                                  onOpen(_evt, ws) {\n        authTimer =
                                 setTimeout(() => {\n          if
                                 (!authenticated) {\n
                                 ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: \"error\", code:
                                  \"auth_timeout\", message: \"Authentication
                                 timeout\" }));\n            ws.close(4001,
                                 \"Authentication timeout\");\n          }\n
                                     }, 10000);\n      },\n      async
                                 onMessage(evt, ws) {\n        try {\n
                                 const msg = JSON.parse(typeof evt.data ===
                                 \"string\" ? evt.data : \"\") as WsMessage;\n
                                         if (!authenticated) {\n            if
                                 (msg.type === \"auth\" && \"api_key\" in msg)
                                 {\n              const keyHash =
                                 hashKey(msg.api_key);\n              const
                                 [key] = await db.select().from(apiKeys).where(e
                                 q(apiKeys.key_hash, keyHash)).limit(1);\n
                                         if (!key) { ws.send(JSON.stringify({
                                 type: \"error\", code: \"unauthorized\",
                                 message: \"Invalid API key\" }));
                                 ws.close(4003, \"Unauthorized\"); return; }\n
                                             authenticated = true;\n
                                   if (authTimer) clearTimeout(authTimer);\n
                                           ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type:
                                 \"auth_ok\", agent_id: key.id }));\n
                                  }\n            return;\n          }\n
                                  if (msg.type === \"ping\")
                                 ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: \"pong\" }));\n
                                        } catch { ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type:
                                  \"error\", code: \"parse_error\", message:
                                 \"Invalid message format\" })); }\n      },\n
                                     onClose() { if (authTimer)
                                 clearTimeout(authTimer); },\n    };\n  }));\n
                                 return wsRouter;\n}\n```\n\nFactory pattern
                                 needed because `@hono/node-ws` provides
                                 `upgradeWebSocket` at server creation
                                 time.\n\n---\n\n### 11. `src/engine/cron.ts` —
                                 NO CHANGES\n### 12. `src/engine/executor.ts` —
                                 NO CHANGES\n\n---\n\n### 13.
                                 `src/engine/scheduler.ts` — NEW FILE
                                 (LocalScheduler)\n\n```ts\nimport { eq } from
                                 \"drizzle-orm\";\nimport * as schema from
                                 \"../db/schema.js\";\nimport {
                                 executeWebhookWithRetry, recordExecution,
                                 advanceSchedule } from
                                 \"./executor.js\";\nimport type { Database,
                                 Scheduler } from \"../types.js\";\n\nconst
                                 WEBHOOK_RETRY_CONFIG = { maxAttempts: 3,
                                 initialBackoffMs: 1000, backoffMultiplier: 5 }
                                 as const;\n\nexport class LocalScheduler
                                 implements Scheduler {\n  private timers = new
                                 Map<string, ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>();\n
                                   private db: Database;\n\n  constructor(db:
                                 Database) { this.db = db; }\n\n
                                 setAlarm(scheduleId: string, runAt: string):
                                 void {\n    this.cancelAlarm(scheduleId);\n
                                 const delayMs = Math.max(0, new
                                 Date(runAt).getTime() - Date.now());\n    const
                                  timer = setTimeout(() => {\n
                                 this.timers.delete(scheduleId);\n
                                 this.fire(scheduleId).catch((err) =>
                                 console.error(`Scheduler fire error
                                 [${scheduleId}]:`, err));\n    }, delayMs);\n
                                   timer.unref();\n
                                 this.timers.set(scheduleId, timer);\n  }\n\n
                                 cancelAlarm(scheduleId: string): void {\n
                                 const existing = this.timers.get(scheduleId);\n
                                     if (existing) { clearTimeout(existing);
                                 this.timers.delete(scheduleId); }\n  }\n\n  /**
                                  Restore timers for all active schedules with a
                                  next_run_at. Call on startup. */\n
                                 restoreAlarms(): void {\n    const rows =
                                 this.db.select().from(schema.schedules).where(e
                                 q(schema.schedules.status,
                                 \"active\")).all();\n    for (const row of
                                 rows) { if (row.next_run_at)
                                 this.setAlarm(row.id, row.next_run_at); }\n
                                 console.log(`Restored ${this.timers.size}
                                 schedule alarm(s)`);\n  }\n\n  shutdown(): void
                                  { for (const t of this.timers.values())
                                 clearTimeout(t); this.timers.clear(); }\n\n
                                 private async fire(scheduleId: string):
                                 Promise<void> {\n    const [schedule] = await
                                 this.db.select().from(schema.schedules).where(e
                                 q(schema.schedules.id, scheduleId)).limit(1);\n
                                     if (!schedule || schedule.status !==
                                 \"active\") return;\n    const transportConfig
                                 = JSON.parse(schedule.transport_config);\n
                                 if (schedule.transport_type === \"webhook\")
                                 {\n      const result = await
                                 executeWebhookWithRetry(transportConfig.url,
                                 JSON.parse(schedule.payload),
                                 transportConfig.headers ?? {},
                                 transportConfig.timeout_ms ?? 10000,
                                 WEBHOOK_RETRY_CONFIG);\n      await
                                 recordExecution(this.db, scheduleId,
                                 \"webhook\", result);\n    } else if
                                 (schedule.transport_type === \"websocket\") {\n
                                       await recordExecution(this.db,
                                 scheduleId, \"websocket\", { status:
                                 \"failure\", error: \"WebSocket transport not
                                 yet available\", duration_ms: 0, attempt_count:
                                  1 });\n    }\n    const nextRunAt = await
                                 advanceSchedule(this.db, scheduleId,
                                 schedule.schedule_type,
                                 schedule.cron_expression, schedule.timezone);\n
                                     if (nextRunAt) this.setAlarm(scheduleId,
                                 nextRunAt);\n  }\n}\n```\n\nDirect port of
                                 `SchedulerDO.alarm()` using `setTimeout`.
                                 `restoreAlarms()` replaces CF cron
                                 sweep.\n\n---\n\n### 14. `src/app.ts` — NEW
                                 FILE (createApp factory)\n\n```ts\nimport {
                                 Hono } from \"hono\";\nimport { cors } from
                                 \"hono/cors\";\nimport { createDbMiddleware }
                                 from \"./middleware/db.js\";\nimport authRouter
                                  from \"./routes/auth.js\";\nimport
                                 schedulesRouter from
                                 \"./routes/schedules.js\";\nimport
                                 executionsRouter from
                                 \"./routes/executions.js\";\nimport {
                                 createWsRoute } from
                                 \"./routes/ws.js\";\nimport type { AppEnv,
                                 Database, Scheduler } from
                                 \"./types.js\";\nimport type { UpgradeWebSocket
                                  } from \"hono/ws\";\n\nexport interface
                                 CreateAppOptions {\n  db: Database;\n
                                 scheduler: Scheduler;\n  upgradeWebSocket?:
                                 UpgradeWebSocket;\n}\n\nexport function
                                 createApp(options: CreateAppOptions):
                                 Hono<AppEnv> {\n  const { db, scheduler,
                                 upgradeWebSocket } = options;\n  const app =
                                 new Hono<AppEnv>();\n\n  app.use(\"*\",
                                 cors());\n  app.use(\"*\",
                                 createDbMiddleware(db));\n  app.use(\"*\",
                                 async (c, next) => { c.set(\"scheduler\",
                                 scheduler); await next(); });\n\n
                                 app.get(\"/health\", (c) => c.json({ ok: true,
                                 data: { status: \"healthy\", version: \"0.1.0\"
                                  } }));\n\n  app.route(\"/v1/auth\",
                                 authRouter);\n  app.route(\"/v1/schedules\",
                                 schedulesRouter);\n  app.route(\"/v1\",
                                 executionsRouter);\n  if (upgradeWebSocket)
                                 app.route(\"/v1/ws\",
                                 createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket));\n\n
                                 app.notFound((c) => c.json({ ok: false, error:
                                 { code: \"not_found\", message: \"Not found\" }
                                  }, 404));\n  app.onError((err, c) => {
                                 console.error(\"Unhandled error:\", err);
                                 return c.json({ ok: false, error: { code:
                                 \"internal_error\", message: \"Internal server
                                 error\" } }, 500); });\n\n  return
                                 app;\n}\n```\n\n**Cloud imports this:** `import
                                  { createApp } from \"@relaycron/server\"` and
                                 provides its own D1-backed db + DO
                                 scheduler.\n\n---\n\n### 15. `src/server.ts` —
                                 NEW FILE (standalone entry
                                 point)\n\n```ts\nimport process from
                                 \"node:process\";\nimport { serve } from
                                 \"@hono/node-server\";\nimport {
                                 createNodeWebSocket } from
                                 \"@hono/node-ws\";\nimport { createDatabase }
                                 from \"./db/sqlite.js\";\nimport {
                                 LocalScheduler } from
                                 \"./engine/scheduler.js\";\nimport { createApp
                                 } from \"./app.js\";\n\nconst DB_PATH =
                                 process.env.DB_PATH ??
                                 \"data/relaycron.db\";\nconst PORT =
                                 Number(process.env.PORT) || 3000;\n\nconst db =
                                  createDatabase(DB_PATH);\nconst scheduler =
                                 new LocalScheduler(db);\nconst {
                                 injectWebSocket, upgradeWebSocket } =
                                 createNodeWebSocket({ app: undefined as any
                                 });\nconst app = createApp({ db, scheduler,
                                 upgradeWebSocket });\nconst server = serve({
                                 fetch: app.fetch, port: PORT }, (info) => {\n
                                 console.log(`relaycron server listening on
                                 http://localhost:${info.port}`);\n
                                 scheduler.restoreAlarms();\n});\ninjectWebSocke
                                 t(server);\n\nprocess.on(\"SIGINT\", () => {
                                 scheduler.shutdown(); process.exit(0);
                                 });\nprocess.on(\"SIGTERM\", () => {
                                 scheduler.shutdown(); process.exit(0);
                                 });\n```\n\n---\n\n### 16. `src/index.ts` — NEW
                                  FILE (package entry for cloud
                                 imports)\n\n```ts\nexport { createApp } from
                                 \"./app.js\";\nexport type { CreateAppOptions }
                                  from \"./app.js\";\nexport type { Database,
                                 Scheduler, AppEnv, AuthContext } from
                                 \"./types.js\";\n```\n\n---\n\n### 17. DELETE
                                 `src/worker.ts`\n\nReplaced by `app.ts` +
                                 `server.ts`.\n\n---\n\n### 18. `tsconfig.json`
                                 — Remove CF types\n\nRemove `\"types\":
                                 [\"@cloudflare/workers-types\"]` from
                                 compilerOptions.\n\n---\n\n### 19. Root
                                 `package.json` — Update db scripts\n\nRemove
                                 `\"db:migrate\": \"wrangler d1 migrations apply
                                  agentcron-db --local\"`.\n\n---\n\n## Summary
                                 Table\n\n| File | Action | CF dep removed
                                 |\n|---|---|---|\n| `package.json` | EDIT |
                                 wrangler, @cloudflare/workers-types |\n|
                                 `tsconfig.json` | EDIT |
                                 @cloudflare/workers-types |\n| `src/types.ts` |
                                  REWRITE | D1Database, DurableObjectNamespace,
                                 DrizzleD1Database |\n| `src/db/schema.ts` |
                                 KEEP | — |\n| `src/db/sqlite.ts` | NEW | — |\n|
                                  `src/middleware/db.ts` | REWRITE |
                                 drizzle-orm/d1, c.env.DB |\n|
                                 `src/middleware/auth.ts` | EDIT |
                                 crypto.subtle, executionCtx.waitUntil |\n|
                                 `src/routes/auth.ts` | EDIT | Env bindings type
                                  |\n| `src/routes/schedules.ts` | EDIT |
                                 SCHEDULER_DO (3 call sites) |\n|
                                 `src/routes/executions.ts` | EDIT | Env
                                 bindings type |\n| `src/routes/ws.ts` | REWRITE
                                  | WebSocketPair |\n| `src/engine/cron.ts` |
                                 KEEP | — |\n| `src/engine/executor.ts` | KEEP |
                                  — |\n| `src/engine/scheduler.ts` | NEW | —
                                 |\n| `src/app.ts` | NEW | — |\n|
                                 `src/server.ts` | NEW | — |\n| `src/index.ts` |
                                  NEW | — |\n| `src/worker.ts` | DELETE | entire
                                  CF worker |\n\n**Zero Cloudflare imports
                                 remain after this rewrite.**\n\nPLAN_COMPLETE")

  relaycast - message.dm.send (MCP)(to: "WorkflowRunner", text: "PLAN: Rewrite
                                   packages/server to remove ALL Cloudflare
                                   dependencies\n\n## Inventory of CF
                                   Dependencies\n\n| Location | CF API/Type |
                                   Replacement |\n|---|---|---|\n| `types.ts` |
                                   `D1Database`, `DurableObjectNamespace`,
                                   `DrizzleD1Database` | `better-sqlite3`,
                                   `BetterSqlite3Database` |\n|
                                   `middleware/db.ts` | `drizzle(\"d1\")`,
                                   `c.env.DB` | Closure-injected db instance
                                   |\n| `middleware/auth.ts` |
                                   `crypto.subtle.digest`,
                                   `c.executionCtx.waitUntil` | `node:crypto
                                   createHash`, fire-and-forget |\n|
                                   `routes/schedules.ts` |
                                   `c.env.SCHEDULER_DO.idFromName/get`, DO stub
                                   fetch | `Scheduler` interface via Hono
                                   context |\n| `routes/ws.ts` |
                                   `WebSocketPair`, CF WebSocket API |
                                   `@hono/node-ws` upgrade helper |\n|
                                   `routes/auth.ts` | `Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>`
                                   | `Hono<AppEnv>` (no CF bindings) |\n|
                                   `routes/executions.ts` | `Hono<{ Bindings:
                                   Env }>` | `Hono<AppEnv>` (no CF bindings)
                                   |\n| `worker.ts` | CF Worker export,
                                   `ScheduledEvent`, `ExecutionContext`, DO
                                   re-export | Replaced by `app.ts` +
                                   `server.ts` |\n| `tsconfig.json` |
                                   `@cloudflare/workers-types` | Remove |\n|
                                   `package.json` | `wrangler`,
                                   `@cloudflare/workers-types`, `drizzle-orm/d1`
                                    | `@hono/node-server`, `@hono/node-ws`,
                                   `better-sqlite3`, `tsx`
                                   |\n\n`engine/executor.ts`, `engine/cron.ts`,
                                   `db/schema.ts` — **already portable, no
                                   changes needed**.\n\n---\n\n## File-by-File
                                   Changes\n\n### 1.
                                   `packages/server/package.json` — Rewrite
                                   deps\n\n**Remove:**
                                   `@cloudflare/workers-types` (devDeps),
                                   `wrangler` (devDeps), all `deploy`
                                   scripts\n\n**Add dependencies:**
                                   `@hono/node-server` `^1.19.0`,
                                   `@hono/node-ws` `^1.1.0`, `better-sqlite3`
                                   `^11.10.0`\n\n**Add devDependencies:**
                                   `@types/better-sqlite3` `^7.6.12`, `tsx`
                                   `^4.19.0`\n\n**Update scripts:**\n```json\n{
                                   \"dev\": \"tsx watch src/server.ts\",
                                   \"start\": \"tsx src/server.ts\", \"build\":
                                   \"tsc\" }\n```\n\n**Add exports** (so cloud
                                   can `import { createApp } from
                                   \"@relaycron/server\"`):\n```json\n{
                                   \"main\": \"dist/index.js\", \"types\":
                                   \"dist/index.d.ts\", \"exports\": { \".\": {
                                   \"types\":1C\"./dist/index.d.ts\", \"import\":
                                    \"./dist/index.js\" } } }\n```\n\nKeep
                                   `\"private\": true`.\n\n---\n\n### 2.
                                   `src/types.ts` — Full rewrite, remove all CF
                                   types\n\n```ts\nimport type {
                                   BetterSQLite3Database } from
                                   \"drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3\";\nimport type
                                   * as schema from
                                   \"./db/schema.js\";\n\nexport type Database =
                                    BetterSQLite3Database<typeof
                                   schema>;\n\nexport interface Scheduler {\n
                                   setAlarm(scheduleId: string, runAt: string):
                                   void;\n  cancelAlarm(scheduleId: string):
                                   void;\n}\n\nexport interface AuthContext {\n
                                    apiKeyId: string;\n}\n\nexport interface
                                   AppEnv {\n  Variables: {\n    db: Database;\n
                                       auth: AuthContext;\n    scheduler:
                                   Scheduler;\n  };\n}\n```\n\nKey: `Env` (CF
                                   bindings) → `AppEnv` (Hono Variables). New
                                   `Scheduler` interface — abstract enough for
                                   cloud to implement with DOs. Remove `declare
                                   module \"hono\"` global
                                   augmentation.\n\n---\n\n### 3.
                                   `src/db/schema.ts` — NO CHANGES (already
                                   portable)\n\n### 4. `src/db/sqlite.ts` — NEW
                                   FILE\n\n```ts\nimport Database from
                                   \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport { drizzle } from
                                   \"drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3\";\nimport * as
                                   schema from \"./schema.js\";\n\nexport
                                   function createDatabase(dbPath: string) {\n
                                   const sqlite = new Database(dbPath);\n
                                   sqlite.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n
                                   sqlite.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n
                                   return drizzle(sqlite, { schema
                                   });\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5.
                                   `src/middleware/db.ts` — Full rewrite
                                   (closure-based)\n\n```ts\nimport {
                                   createMiddleware } from
                                   \"hono/factory\";\nimport type { AppEnv,
                                   Database } from \"../types.js\";\n\nexport
                                   function createDbMiddleware(db: Database) {\n
                                     return createMiddleware<AppEnv>(async (c,
                                   next) => {\n    c.set(\"db\", db);\n    await
                                    next();\n  });\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 6.
                                   `src/middleware/auth.ts` — Edit: Node.js
                                   crypto, remove waitUntil\n\n1. Replace
                                   `crypto.subtle.digest` → `node:crypto
                                   createHash` (becomes synchronous)\n2. Replace
                                    `c.executionCtx.waitUntil(...)` → direct
                                   call (synchronous with better-sqlite3)\n3.
                                   Change generic from `<{ Bindings: Env }>` to
                                   `<AppEnv>`\n\n```ts\nimport { createHash }
                                   from \"node:crypto\";\nfunction hashKey(key:
                                   string): string {\n  return
                                   createHash(\"sha256\").update(key).digest(\"h
                                   ex\");\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 7.
                                   `src/routes/auth.ts` — Minimal edit\n- `Env`
                                   → `AppEnv`, `Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>` →
                                   `Hono<AppEnv>`\n\n### 8.
                                   `src/routes/schedules.ts` — Edit: Replace DO
                                   calls with Scheduler\n\n- `Env` → `AppEnv`,
                                   `Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>` → `Hono<AppEnv>`\n-
                                    **Create** (lines 134-142):
                                   `c.env.SCHEDULER_DO...` →
                                   `c.get(\"scheduler\").setAlarm(id,
                                   nextRunAt)`\n- **Update** (lines 332-348): DO
                                    alarm → `scheduler.setAlarm()`/`scheduler.ca
                                   ncelAlarm()`\n- **Delete** (lines 386-389):
                                   DO cancel → `scheduler.cancelAlarm()`\n\n###
                                   9. `src/routes/executions.ts` — Minimal
                                   edit\n- `Env` → `AppEnv`, `Hono<{ Bindings:
                                   Env }>` → `Hono<AppEnv>`\n\n---\n\n### 10.
                                   `src/routes/ws.ts` — Full rewrite with
                                   @hono/node-ws\n\nExport factory
                                   `createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket)` using Hono
                                   WS helpers:\n```ts\nimport type {
                                   UpgradeWebSocket } from \"hono/ws\";\nexport
                                   function createWsRoute(upgradeWebSocket:
                                   UpgradeWebSocket) {\n  // ... uses
                                   upgradeWebSocket() with
                                   onOpen/onMessage/onClose handlers\n  // Same
                                   auth logic, but using ws.send/ws.close
                                   instead of CF
                                   WebSocketPair\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 11.
                                   `src/engine/cron.ts` — NO CHANGES\n### 12.
                                   `src/engine/executor.ts` — NO
                                   CHANGES\n\n---\n\n### 13.
                                   `src/engine/scheduler.ts` — NEW FILE
                                   (LocalScheduler)\n\nDirect port of
                                   `SchedulerDO.alarm()` logic using
                                   `setTimeout`:\n- `setAlarm(id, runAt)` →
                                   schedules setTimeout, stores in Map\n-
                                   `cancelAlarm(id)` → clears timeout\n-
                                   `restoreAlarms()` → on startup, queries all
                                   active schedules and re-arms timers (replaces
                                    CF cron sweep)\n- `shutdown()` → clears all
                                   timers\n- `fire(id)` → loads schedule,
                                   executes webhook with retry, records
                                   execution, advances schedule, re-arms if
                                   recurring\n\n---\n\n### 14. `src/app.ts` —
                                   NEW FILE (createApp factory)\n\n```ts\nexport
                                    interface CreateAppOptions {\n  db:
                                   Database;\n  scheduler: Scheduler;\n
                                   upgradeWebSocket?:
                                   UpgradeWebSocket;\n}\nexport function
                                   createApp(options: CreateAppOptions):
                                   Hono<AppEnv> { ... }\n```\n\n**This is what
                                   cloud imports.** Wires up CORS, db
                                   middleware, scheduler middleware, all routes.
                                    `upgradeWebSocket` is
                                   optional.\n\n---\n\n### 15. `src/server.ts` —
                                    NEW FILE (standalone entry point)\n\nCreates
                                    better-sqlite3 db, LocalScheduler,
                                   @hono/node-ws, calls `createApp()`, serves
                                   with `@hono/node-server`. Restores alarms on
                                   startup. Graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM
                                   shutdown.\n\n---\n\n### 16. `src/index.ts` —
                                   NEW FILE (package entry)\n\n```ts\nexport {
                                   createApp } from \"./app.js\";\nexport type {
                                    CreateAppOptions } from
                                   \"./app.js\";\nexport type { Database,
                                   Scheduler, AppEnv, AuthContext } from
                                   \"./types.js\";\n```\n\n---\n\n### 17. DELETE
                                    `src/worker.ts` — Replaced by app.ts +
                                   server.ts\n\n### 18. `tsconfig.json` — Remove
                                    `\"types\":
                                   [\"@cloudflare/workers-types\"]`\n\n### 19.
                                   Root `package.json` — Remove `\"db:migrate\":
                                    \"wrangler d1 migrations
                                   apply...\"`\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n| File |
                                   Action |\n|---|---|\n| `package.json` | EDIT
                                   |\n| `tsconfig.json` | EDIT |\n|
                                   `src/types.ts` | REWRITE |\n|
                                   `src/db/schema.ts` | KEEP |\n|
                                   `src/db/sqlite.ts` | NEW |\n|
                                   `src/middleware/db.ts` | REWRITE |\n|
                                   `src/middleware/auth.ts` | EDIT |\n|
                                   `src/routes/auth.ts` | EDIT |\n|
                                   `src/routes/schedules.ts` | EDIT |\n|
                                   `src/routes/executions.ts` | EDIT |\n|
                                   `src/routes/ws.ts` | REWRITE |\n|
                                   `src/engine/cron.ts` | KEEP |\n|
                                   `src/engine/executor.ts` | KEEP |\n|
                                   `src/engine/scheduler.ts` | NEW |\n|
                                   `src/app.ts` | NEW |\n| `src/server.ts` | NEW
                                    |\n| `src/index.ts` | NEW |\n|
                                   `src/worker.ts` | DELETE |\n\n**Zero
                                   Cloudflare imports remain after this rewrite.
                                   **\n\nPLAN_COMPLETE\n\nOWNER_DECISION:
                                   COMPLETE\nREASON: Detailed file-by-file plan
                                   covering all 19 files with exact changes,
                                   Scheduler interface, createApp factory, and
                                   LocalScheduler
                                   implementation.\n\nSTEP_COMPLETE:plan")

  Relay message from broker [init_5cc1732d4ef04085b3a657aaab07d3d4]: Plan the   
  rewrite of packages/server to remove ALL Cloudflare dependencies.             
  All packages have been renamed from @agentcron/* to @relaycron/* already.     
                                                                                
  CURRENT CF SERVER (being rewritten):                                          
  === worker.ts ===                                                             
  import { Hono } from "hono";                                                  
  import { cors } from "hono/cors";                                             
  import { dbMiddleware } from "./middleware/db.js";                            
  import authRouter from "./routes/auth.js";                                    
  import schedulesRouter from "./routes/schedules.js";                          
  import executionsRouter from "./routes/executions.js";                        
  import wsRouter from "./routes/ws.js";                                        
  import type { Env } from "./types.js";                                        
                                                                                
  export { SchedulerDO } from "./durable-objects/scheduler-do.js";              
                                                                                
  const app = new Hono<{ Bindings: Env }>();                                    
                                                                                
  // Global middleware                                                          
  app.use("*", cors());                                                         
  app.use("*", dbMiddleware);                                                   
                                                                                
  // Health check                                                               
  app.get("/health", (c) =>                                                     
    c.json({ ok: true, data: { status: "healthy", version: "0.1.0" } })         
  );                                                                            
                                                                                
  // Routes                                                                     
  app.route("/v1/auth", authRouter);                                            
  app.route("/v1/schedules", schedulesRouter);                                  
  app.route("/v1", executionsRouter);                                           
  app.route("/v1/ws", wsRouter);                                                
                                                                                
  // 404                                                                        
  app.notFound((c) =>                                                           
    c.json(

      },

    );                                                                          
  });
